title: Quest XL Double Omelette Maker, Deep Fill Pan, Makes Two Omelettes, Non-Stick Easy to Clean
features: DOUBLE OMELETTE MAKER – Cook two delicious, fluffy omelettes at once in this Twin Omelette Maker! Each plate measures 12cm in diameter, allowing for larger, thicker omelettes to be enjoyed at any time of the day.

NON STICK PLATES – Each of the plates are covered in a non-stick coating, making omelettes not only easy to remove, but also ensuring less oil will be needed, resulting in healthier omelettes. Once cooled, the plates can simply be wiped clean.

AUTOMATIC EASY COOKING – Featuring automatic temperature control, you don’t even need to adjust any settings for cooking – simply fill the plates when the ready indicator light is on, close the lid, and cooking will begin. The appliance stands upright for easy access.

SAFE & COMPACT – The indicator lights will signal once your omelettes are done, at which point you can safely retrieve them thanks to the cool touch handle. The machine’s overheat protection ensures no risk of burning, and its base features skid-resistant feet, as well as cord storage so that it avoids taking up space.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Dual Plates Enjoy 2 freshly cooked omelettes at once thanks to the dual plate design. Each plate measures 12cm. Indicator Lights The helpful indicator lights let you know when cooking is ready to begin, and when it is done. Automatic Controls The omelette maker has automatic temperature control, so no adjustments are needed before cooking. Cool Touch Handle Safely check the progress of your omelettes at any time, as the handle is always cool to touch. Non-Stick Surface Remove your finished omelettes & clean the plates after with ease, thanks to the non-stick coating.
